title: Lasallea adnata
taxonomy: Lasallea adnata is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Ericaceae. It is a member of the genus Lasallea, which was previously included in the genus Kalmia. The Ericaceae family is a large and diverse group of plants commonly known as heath or heather families. The family Ericaceae includes many species of shrubs and trees found in temperate and boreal regions. Lasallea adnata is native to North America.
